content: *경이 물품, 고급 (조율 필요)* --- 이 장화는 총 4회의 충전을 가지며, 매일 새벽에 소모된 충전을 1d4만큼 회복합니다. 착용자가 [마법](/1def7f5a1e8081d69aa0f579a00ee48b?pvs=25) 행동을 사용하여 1회의 충전을 소모하면 1시간 동안 비행 속도 30ft를 얻습니다. 비행 효과가 끝났을 때 공중에 있다면, 매 라운드마다 30ft씩 천천히 하강하여 안전하게 착지합니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/bb005846-fd44-44c8-9309-3e7283fc77df/638657414293325345.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466RXFIVQCY%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T095241Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJGMEQCID%2Fp4MHU1%2F6jLnS2R2OH5NTxX8OXe%2FVC%2FRpJgCo6McTqAiAlhMe72YIbZqTM6jsWzIaqQ4TyZJAMls7ksJhwHagXYir%2FAwhwEAAaDDYzNzQyMzE4MzgwNSIMCmJE1EYtkRf49DgSKtwDX8utO2W9505qTqUTF6JLgfMI%2B5lIy7BT9aIjiQQy9jU4fu89HkYKvSDNFdw2xnjIKWgclcyHoR2efjzwnApJBO7WsYxDFzvQDJpNdaTtlnv%2Bi%2F842SNw6D64chlvnfaxHnHUdPguI6iKy98ve3ermlsYMqdGm8hVYE90dSBCJc9yGwr0HrJqCmrUhHII8crTyxHsGT2aVBkQ2rdmeFSdOw12P4otCzDq3jLe%2F4s3ujapiORKfwSQ2BFlGxoMBRUP%2F0G2B0eNS5DoEiEejAZyJYQ33HqiWX2oqgYlciBpIMsyTzrNOpl4SwRajGntPaZodEg2TcC%2FglVtT%2BAWgLVMlEvr2jD31FAmOnpwqUL3rx40n4nIIYX9RtZpiEGeLu3%2F8mF0ovgS87bDVEiBy4CcPZE8CRn5I5QlzREP3WePUNOGrWUuHm31NF0QYhMgMYNAG%2FPfX%2F%2F10ecwjHAwT5U4rbi3YxZ6nJ7iYDEe0L2eWdOXGO%2FbyGAVr1eSdZGpf1FJYqYyEnUgjKdgb9Som04bMlrHVa4Kfk%2BIjGbPcmP%2FYSKK6TCinrPt43bFOPtloiX6MZ5io8ZTdOrrF9OCsDhOgRkVvIb98TSKX3denuM0iL3NhazfGrSaRSMpnE0w7tvD0QY6pgFvkpP46y%2BTsWiQ8GMe1m7hj%2BJBWO4p39rJGHtKjYZL4yzK3r3IEvA%2FwJXmOhe8xVPJp7RUOPo4Gn94bcR1su9DBmReoZbFMzJOMLgElE08vPRtA4M4tB2jcDCcRiZoLHvC%2Bdd6bW6XdMxFhR0v971Nuz59oYQmPEhJR5hgqcC0U%2BQclLVZjuB9DIqE1AGvipuIPCVdHwilGsfDf8K9mfEQvZ7VQjbh&X-Amz-Signature=097fe25df62d9503ba5879300787f05d02ae0ebf85208cf21ead18acd39679b1&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
